rulings.Case Title: KARIM H. TAHIR VS. JIMMY BUDIHALIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Amd Otion To Enforce The Nov-11-11 Settlement Agreement And Compel X-Defts To Accep Tht Efeb-24-12 Offer
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 14, 2012, line 7 -CROSS COMPLAINANT JIMMY BUDIHALIM's Motion To Enforce The Nov-11-11 Settlement Agreement And Compel Cross-Defendants To Accep The feb-24-12 Offer. Deny 1. Offer accepted march 6. 2. No time limit as to signing of finalized settlement agreemtnt. 3. CCP 128.5 in applicable not pre 12/31/1994 case.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARCOS ANDRADE GALVAN VS. ONEWEST BANK, FSB, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 14, 2012, line 1, DFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. LINGLING SORIANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 14, 2012, line 6 - DEFENDANT LINGLING SORIANO's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Deny moving party failed to show causes of action in federal court are in rem/quasi in rem as required by authority cited by moving party i.e. Chapman vs. Deutsche Bank.=(501/REQ)
